title: TinkerDen command surface command
command: REAL_RELAY_PROOF: Nerdkle organism worker must receive this packet, generate an answer, and return answer proof.
mission: REAL_RELAY_PROOF: Nerdkle organism worker must receive this packet, generate an answer, and return answer proof.
context: Issued from Command Dash. Relay must write a linked Aeye inbox packet and return ACK / BLOCKER / ARTIFACT.
do: Write linked Aeye inbox custody files.
Return a receipt linked to packet_id.
do_not: Do not call sender-side write proof.
Do not auto-send outside the local filesystem relay.
output_required: A linked receipt with packet hash and Aeye relay custody paths.
proof_rule: Receiver must read the packet file and match the sender-side SHA-256 file hash before ACK.
